full_text:
Chunyu Dan 淳于丹
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chunyu Dan (淳于丹). Sent by Lu Xun to test Liu Bei’s encampments. Is defeated and wounded. Chunyu Dan is a fictional character. Chunyu Dan was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
